title: Canary router and rollback automation
goal: Implement staged traffic splitting and automatic rollback for challenger profile deployments.
constraints: Rollback triggers must be time-window based.
Kill switch must disable steering safely.
verify_command: pnpm test --filter rollout && pnpm run canary:simulation
definition_of_done: Auto rollback triggers on configured threshold breaches.
Kill switch forces baseline no-steering path.
rollback_note: If canary logic is unstable, route 100% traffic to champion profile and disable challenger routing.
